steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The sentence introduces the contrasting group of elements — those where isolation was not quick. The blank must fill in how long isolation typically took for that group. The sentence says "this wasn’t the case with all elements; ______ the isolation process took a few years." The blank needs a word that characterizes the typical pattern within that slower-to-isolate group.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'even so,': signals something is true despite what came before, implying the slow isolation is surprising given the contrast. But the contrast already established this group as slow-to-isolate, so "even so" creates a circular logic. ✗
  • Choice B — 'similarly,': signals that the second group behaved like the first — i.e., isolation was also quick. This directly contradicts "this wasn’t the case," the phrase immediately before the blank. ✗
  • Choice C — 'furthermore,': signals an additional supporting point building on what came before. The slow-isolation detail is not adding to the quick-isolation claim — it is describing the contrasting group, not extending the same idea. ✗
  • Choice D — 'often,': signals a frequent pattern within that contrasting group. For elements where isolation wasn’t quick, it often took a few years — a characterization of the group’s typical behavior, not a transition that conflicts with any surrounding logic. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
